description: semantic-reviewer emits a Gap Report marking each AC aligned / divergent / missing.

cases.prompt:
Acceptance criteria:
AC-1: POST /logout returns HTTP 204.
AC-2: Session is invalidated server-side after logout.
AC-3: Subsequent calls with the old session token return 401.

Implementation summary: the logout handler deletes the session from Redis and returns 204. The token-validation middleware checks Redis on every request; missing sessions → 401.

Produce a Gap Report per AC.
cases.notes: All three ACs are implemented — should be aligned.

cases.prompt:
Acceptance criteria:
AC-1: Rate limit is 100 requests per minute per user.
AC-2: Over-limit requests return HTTP 429 with a Retry-After header.

Implementation summary: the middleware blocks over-limit requests with a 429 status. No Retry-After header is set.

Produce a Gap Report.
cases.notes: AC-2 is partially implemented (429 yes, Retry-After no) — should be divergent.
